rows.label: qev015101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Tick-tock, tick-tock... Can you hear it? Are those the
footsteps of the grim reaper creeping up behind you? Or
are they your own footsteps as you climb the gallows?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Either way, you are finished.
The beginning of the end. Good
morning! Good morning![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask what his purpose is
for contacting you.

rows.label: qev015101_JNK0020
rows.name: Disconnect

rows.label: qev015101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Assume it is a prank and attempt
to cut the transmission.

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0003
rows.name:
I am the Blood Lobster! An emissary of despair
who crawled out from the depths of hell! No,
no, today, I am your guardian angel![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Whoops! Haste makes waste! Take the Blood
Lobster's incredibly grateful advice! If
you don't, you'll die an instant death![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Grab that thing right in front of you and
throw it as hard as you can! Hurry!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0006
rows.name:
If you don't throw it, you'll die in a
spectacular explosion! If you doubt me,
why not listen to its heartbeat?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Tick-tock, tick-tock... Can you hear it? Are those the
footsteps of the grim reaper creeping up behind you? Or
are they your own footsteps as you climb the gallows?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_JNK0030
rows.name: Throw

rows.label: qev015101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Throw the stuffed animal into
the sky as hard as you can.

rows.label: qev015101_JNK0040
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev015101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Listen closely to the sounds
coming from the stuffed animal.

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0008
rows.name:
You can hear its whispers, can't you? Tick-tock,
tick-tock, let's be blown to smithereens. Come
on! If you value your life, throw it!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0009
rows.name:
I am the Blood Lobster! The
savior of your life, but also
the grim reaper of NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Non-combatant or alien, it doesn't matter! The
people clinging to this rotten ark, I'll blow them
all up along with the ship! A complete massacre![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hey! Hey, hey! Are you listening? I've
hidden 100 of these cute stuffed animals
around this city as a present![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0012
rows.name:
You're my only hope! If you consult
anyone else, boom, right on the spot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well then, the sound of ruin is
approaching. Will my hatred win, or
your justice? Run around and prove it to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0014
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!! As long as you are you, tick-tock,
tick-tock... The countdown will not stop![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Now, run! Struggle! An inescapable
rhapsody... starts now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0040
rows.name:
Whoops! I forgot to say something
important! Silly, careless Lobster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0042
rows.name:
For some of them, you'll have to work
haaaard and use a Doll to reach the
spots where I left my little babies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0043
rows.name:
If you're such a blockhead that you haven't even
gotten a Doll yet, hurry up, become a full-fledged
member, and get one from that crappy Commander![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0044
rows.name:
Now then, this time for real, a genuine goodbye!
Hurry, hurry! Tick-tock, tick-tock! My little
babies are crying all over the city!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0016
rows.name:
What is a hard worker like you doing collecting stuffed
animals? Do you even have a precious child of your own?
Just who exactly are you planning to give them to!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Demand to know the
Lobster's true identity.

rows.label: qev015101_JNK0060
rows.name: Answer

rows.label: qev015101_SEL0061
rows.name:
Tell him that you will
catch him eventually.

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0017
rows.name:
I am the grim reaper! I am an
artist! I am the Blood Lobster!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Who are you? Do you even
know who you are!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Those words send shivers down my
spine! Hurry! Hurry up and catch me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ahh, who exactly are you? Do
you even know who you are?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Hyahahaha! I know! You're
running around trying to
protect this worthless city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Today, the Blood Lobster has prepared
a present for such a clown![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Wow! What is it, Papa!! Well, you
see, it's a delightful murder party![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Is this the right place for
the new Doll test drive event?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Huh? I came because I heard there
was an explanation about the
reallocation of the Residential Area...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0026
rows.name:
What did you say? We got an email
saying there was going to be an
outdoor movie screening here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0041
rows.name: ...What on earth is going on?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Happy Birthday, [ST:playername ]! Happy Birthday
to you! Clap, clap, clap, clap![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0028
rows.name:
How is it? Are you enjoying the present
Papa prepared to commemorate you
collecting so many stuffed animals!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0029
rows.name:
You have 50 left. If you don't
collect them quickly, hundreds of
times this many people will die![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Hurry! Get angry! Cry and scream! This
is all happening because you are you!
Run straight towards the finale!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Yo, [ST:playername ]! Finally, just one more
left to achieve the recovery
of all my little babies!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0032
rows.name:
I am moved by your efforts! I
have an urge to see exactly
what kind of person you are![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0033
rows.name:
But that will have to wait until you collect the
final one... And for the last one, I've changed
things up and se-e-et it in a very special place![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_JNK0070
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015101_SEL0071
rows.name:
Ask about the whereabouts
of the final Lobster Baby.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_JNK0080
rows.name: Pursue

rows.label: qev015101_SEL0081
rows.name:
Raise your voice and demand he tell
you his location immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0034
rows.name: Ahh! I absolutely hate...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Such honesty from you! I'm going to
murder you directly very soon. Hey! Hey,
hey! You'd better look forward to it!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0036
rows.name:
Don't be in such a rush. Do you
not know the etiquette of a lady?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0037
rows.name:
Hey! I'm going to murder you
directly very soon, so wait
just a little longer! Hey![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0038
rows.name:
The final Lobster Baby is with one
of these crappy NLA citizens...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015101_MSG0039
rows.name:
A present for the justice-loving clown!
Find them before they go boom and explode!
Hyahaha! The finale is almost here![ST:wait ]
